messages.Page Break Help: Content after this marker starts on a new page.
messages.editorAccessDenied: You do not have permission to edit this template.
messages.editorDraftOnly: Only draft templates can be opened in the editor.
messages.editorNotFound: The template was not found or is no longer available.
messages.editorLoadFailed: The editor could not load the template. Try again.
messages.editorElementsPlaceholder: Element controls will be added in the next editor phase.
messages.editorVariablesPlaceholder: Variable browsing is not available yet.
messages.editorEmptyCanvas: This draft is ready for visual editing
messages.editorMechanicsPending: Canvas editing mechanics are introduced in the following phases.
messages.editorInspectorPlaceholder: Select an element to inspect its properties.
messages.editorReloaded: The current server draft was loaded.
messages.editorClientValidationFailed: The draft contains invalid or unsupported layout data and was not sent.
messages.editorServerValidationFailed: The server rejected the draft layout. Review the layout and try again.
messages.editorSaveAccessDenied: You no longer have permission to save this draft.
messages.editorSaveConflictUnsupported: The draft could not be saved because another conflicting change is required.
messages.editorSaveFailed: The draft could not be saved. Your local changes are still available.
messages.editorInvalidSaveResponse: The server returned an invalid save response. Your local changes remain unsaved.
messages.editorRevisionConflict: Another session saved this draft first. Choose how to continue.
messages.editorRevisionConflictExplanation: The server contains a newer revision. Reload it to discard your local changes, or explicitly retry to replace it with your current draft.
messages.editorRetryWarning: Retry Save will overwrite the newer server draft with your local layout.
messages.editorReloadFailed: The current server draft could not be reloaded. Your local changes are still available.
messages.editorFlowEmpty: Add or drag a flow section here to begin.
messages.editorInvalidFlowDrop: That item cannot be placed at this location.
messages.editorStaticTextSample: Sample static text (not saved as content)
messages.editorParagraphSample: Sample paragraph text (not saved as content)
messages.editorValidationSchemaError: This setting is invalid. Select the item to correct it.
messages.editorValidationEmptyLayout: The document has no sections yet.
messages.editorValidationEmptyContent: This content element is empty; sample text is shown only in the editor.
messages.confirmRemoveComplexNode: Remove this structure and every element inside it? This action can be undone from the editor toolbar.
messages.editorEntityCatalogueFailed: Available entities could not be loaded.
messages.editorEntitySourceHelp: Only entities allowed by configuration and your current read access are listed.
messages.confirmEntitySourceChange: Change the template data source? Existing source-dependent references may become unavailable.
messages.editorVariableSourceRequired: Select an entity data source to browse readable fields and relationships.
messages.editorMetadataFailed: Readable metadata could not be loaded.
messages.confirmDuplicate: Create a new draft copy of this template? Published versions and generation history will not be copied.
messages.confirmArchive: Archive this template? New generation will be disabled and existing history will be preserved.
messages.confirmDraftFromVersion: Replace the current draft content with the selected immutable published version?
messages.draftCreated: Draft created from the published version.

tooltips.sourceType: Source selection is managed by the draft workflow.
tooltips.currentDraftLayout: The normalized canonical layout used by the draft workflow.
tooltips.revision: Incremented by the revision-aware draft save workflow.
